positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a curious, friendly fox peeking out from behind oversized, stylized flowering succulents. The scene should be composed with clean lines and a strong central silhouette. Use a color palette of deep teal, earthy terracotta, and pops of vibrant burnt orange. The art style should be modern botanical line art combined with flat, graphic color blocking, giving it a vibrant yet sophisticated feel. High contrast, perfect for seamless apparel printing. --ar 1:1 --v 5
negative: low resolution, blurry, dirty, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor details, photographic, hyperrealism
